December. 00 - Eligible is not a Medicare Beneficiary
01 - Eligible is entitled to Medicare - QMB only
02 - Eligible is entitled to Medicare - QMB and Full Medicaid
03 - Eligible is entitled to Medicare - SLMB only
04 - Eligible is entitled to Medicare - SLMB and Full Medicaid
05 - Eligible is entitled to Medicare - QDWI
06 - Eligible is entitled to Medicare - Qualifying Individuals
07 - Eligible is entitled to Medicare - Qualifying Individual
08 - Eligible is entitled to Medicare -
